title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Sanji, Unknown person #12, Tama as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: hurts, huh? Did you think I'd just let you dominate the fight?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way you didn't feel that kick that sent you flying earlier!! We've been going all out for a while...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So it's no surprise we're getting weaker!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The difference is I've found my resolve and accepted my fate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not the same man you fought on the live floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Show me then... let's see how you've changed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Next up is your technique,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stealth Black!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sure do have a lot of tricks up your sleeve.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He disappeared too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he isn't even wearing the suit!! No, he's moving faster than the eye can see!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'll have to reappear when he's outta stamina!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What a stupid attempt to counter me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Squeak

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Squeak squeak

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: THERE YOU ARE, CHUJ!!! YOU'RE OKAY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Chuji, over here, quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Squeak squeak

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fighting could break out again at any second!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OSOME!! That tramp!! she's refused my summons dozens of times...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She even rejected me today, but she seems perfectly fine!! <

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She was my number one ever since Komurasaki- tan met her tragic end!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought she was bedridden due to a terrible migraine...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Squeak squeak

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's funny that she can apparently walk around carefree now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess I haven't dished out enough "divine punishment". Yet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Have some more!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have more tools at my disposal now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A sturdy exoskeleton, enhanced strength, and super speed. I'll make use of them all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I pair the exoskeleton 'protection with my arrangement. Haki training my legs should be able to stand flames much hotter than before!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ifrit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...JAMBE!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: The speed and weight behind my kicks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Will be on another level!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I under- stand now...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was you! You hit her, didn't you queen?! You're NOTHING BUT TRASH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: KyaH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Collier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Squeak

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Kyah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: URG!!!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
